request_detail: Copy of all personal data held
response_content_summary: Full data export including application data, policy details, and claims history. Delivered via secure portal.
Active policy data retained per insurance regulatory requirements. Marketing preferences deleted. Quote history deleted. Informed of regulatory retention basis.
notes: Regulatory retention overrides erasure right for active policy and claims data.

request_detail: Access all data including claims history
response_content_summary: Application data, policy history, and 2 claims files provided. Health questionnaire responses included.

request_detail: Export all data in machine-readable format
response_content_summary: JSON export of application data, policy details, and claims records. Delivered via secure download link.

request_detail: Restrict processing pending accuracy dispute on property valuation
response_content_summary: Processing restricted on disputed property valuation records. Policy administration continues but disputed data flagged.

Objection rejected. Credit assessment is necessary for legitimate interests in risk pricing. Compelling grounds documented: actuarial necessity for accurate risk assessment, regulatory expectation of risk-based pricing.
notes: Credit check objection requires balancing test. Documented compelling grounds.

request_detail: What third-party sources was my data obtained from?
response_content_summary: Response stated: 'We obtained information from external databases as part of our standard assessment process. This may include driving history and financial indicators.' No specific sources named.
notes: Response did not identify LexisNexis or TransUnion by name. Did not specify which data elements were obtained from which source.

request_detail: Application declined — requesting explanation of automated decision and logic
response_content_summary: Response: 'Your application was assessed against our underwriting criteria and did not meet the threshold for approval. Factors considered include your application responses, driving history, and financial profile. You have the right to request human review of this decision by contacting our underwriting team.'
notes: Applicant's motor insurance application declined by automated underwriting system. Response did not include: specific factors that led to decline, relative weighting of factors, risk score, or threshold information. SHAP explainability tools available in underwriting dashboard but not used to generate individual explanation.

request_detail: Full data access including any data obtained from third parties
response_content_summary: Full export provided. Third-party sourced data included in export but source not labeled. Credit score and driving record present in export but identified only as 'underwriting supplementary data.'
notes: Third-party sourced data included but not labeled with source attribution.

response_content_summary: Application and policy data deleted. Claims data retained per 10-year regulatory requirement. Fraud analytics data not addressed in response.
notes: Claims data retained per regulation. Response did not address whether fraud analytics data was also deleted or retained.

response_content_summary: Standard full export. Application, policy, premium history provided.

request_detail: Application declined — requesting human review of automated decision
response_content_summary: Applicant's health insurance declined by automated system. Human review assigned to underwriting team. Review not yet completed as of December 31, 2025. 26 days elapsed since request.
